# Mariden Resort and Homestay Siargao

> Quiet family-run pool resort in Del Carmen, Siargao, Philippines — 5 minutes from the airport. Affordable, family-friendly accommodations with free Starlink WiFi.

---

## Quick Facts

- **Location**: Brgy. Lobogon, Del Carmen, Surigao del Norte 8418, Philippines
- **Distance from Siargao Airport (IAO)**: 5 minutes by car
- **Distance from General Luna/Cloud 9**: 20-25 minutes (15 km)
- **Founded**: 2022
- **Type**: Family-run boutique resort
- **Price Range**: ₱1,500 - ₱4,000 per night
- **Open Hours**: 8:00 AM - 8:00 PM daily
- **Languages**: English, Filipino

---

## Contact Information

- **Phone/WhatsApp**: +63 920 725 4405
- **Email**: info@maridenresort.com
- **Facebook**: https://www.facebook.com/MaridenResort
- **Google Maps**: https://maps.app.goo.gl/YqtvhJ5DspCZxY2Z6
- **Address**: Brgy. Lobogon, Del Carmen, Surigao del Norte 8418, Philippines

---

## Rooms & Accommodations

Comfortable, clean, and family-friendly accommodations in Del Carmen, perfect for families and couples visiting Sugba Lagoon and exploring Siargao.

### Twin A-Frame Room — ₱2,500/night
A compact, stylish A-frame room with 1 double bed and 1 sofa bed and a private bathroom with a shower, bidet, and hot water. The best part? A porch with a relaxing view of the property, perfect for your morning coffee.

- **Capacity**: Good for 2-4 guests (double bed + sofa bed)
- **Free early check-in** (subject to availability)
- **Amenities included**:
  - 1 Double Bed + 1 Sofa Bed
  - Air Conditioning
  - Private Porch
  - Hot & Cold Shower
  - Private Bathroom with Bidet
  - Laundry Service Available
  - Free Starlink WiFi

### Cozy Double Room — ₱1,500/night
Great for couples or friends. This air-conditioned room features a comfortable double bed and a private bathroom with a shower, bidet, and hot water. An extra guest can be accommodated, but it might get a little cozy!

- **Capacity**: Good for 2 guests (up to 3 with extra bed at ₱500)
- **Free early check-in** (subject to availability)
- **Amenities included**:
  - Double Bed
  - Air Conditioning
  - Private Bathroom
  - Hot & Cold Shower
  - Laundry Service Available
  - Free Starlink WiFi

### Snug Family Room — ₱4,000/night
Our private standalone cottage is ideal for small groups and families. It has a living area, private bathroom, one double bed, one bunk bed, and an optional single mattress. Designed for both charm and practicality.

- **Capacity**: Good for 6 guests (fits up to 8 with extra beds at ₱500 each)
- **Free early check-in** (subject to availability)
- **Amenities included**:
  - Private Cottage
  - Air Conditioning
  - Living Area
  - 1 Double Bed + 1 Bunk Bed
  - Hot & Cold Shower
  - Private Bathroom
  - Laundry Service Available
  - Free Starlink WiFi

---

## Amenities & Services

### Included for All Guests
- **Swimming Pool**: Open daily 8AM-8PM (closed during monthly maintenance)
- **Free Starlink WiFi**: High-speed internet with dedicated access point per room
- **Free Bottled Water**: Complimentary for all guests
- **Free Parking**: Available for all guests
- **Kitchen Access**: Guests may use the kitchen (clean as you go policy)
- **Towels & Toiletries**: Fresh towels and refillable shampoo/body wash provided

### Available Services (Additional Cost)
- **Airport Transfers**: ₱200 each way to/from Siargao Airport (IAO)
- **General Luna Transfers**: ₱500 per trip
- **Laundry Service**: ₱60/kg (minimum ₱300), same-day or 24-hour turnaround
- **Motorbike Rentals**: Available with discounts for 3+ day rentals
- **Extra Beds**: ₱500 per bed
- **Island Tours**: Can connect you with trusted local guides
- **Catering Services**: Custom food packages for events

### Event Venues (Cottages)
- **Small Cottage (₱500)**: Seats 10-15 guests
- **Medium Cottage (₱1,000)**: Seats 20-30 guests
- **Large Cottage (₱1,500)**: Seats 50-60 guests

### Event Packages
- **Package A (₱4,000)**: ₱1,000 cottage + FREE videoke + free entrance for all guests
- **Package B (₱5,000)**: ₱1,500 cottage + FREE videoke + free entrance for all guests
- **Package C (₱10,000)**: Exclusive entire resort rental + FREE videoke + free entrance

### On-Site Mini Store (Sari-Sari Store)
- Snacks, chips, candies, instant noodles
- Soft drinks, water, juice
- Cash and digital payments accepted

---

## Booking Information

### Direct Booking (Best Rates)
- **URL**: https://book.maridenresort.com/booking/result?code=019d8aea-246b-78ee-8502-31f2f1f946fe
- Book directly for the best rates

### Third-Party Platforms
- Booking.com: https://www.booking.com/hotel/ph/mariden-resort.html
- Airbnb: https://www.airbnb.com/users/profile/1470536719622302776
- Agoda: https://www.agoda.com/mariden-resort/hotel/siargao-island-ph.html
- Expedia: https://www.expedia.com/Del-Carmen-Hotels-Mariden-Resort.h103590569.Hotel-Information
- Traveloka: https://www.traveloka.com/en-ph/hotel/philippines/mariden-resort--homestay-siargao-9000003309292

### Reservation Policy
- **Deposit**: 30% down payment required to secure booking (non-refundable but deductible from total)
- **Without deposit**: Reservations are first-come, first-served
- **Cancellation**: Full refund if cancelled 30+ days before arrival; deposit forfeited if cancelled within 30 days

### Payment Methods
- Cash
- PayPal
- Wise
- Xendit (Mastercard/Visa)
- GCash (upon request)
- Bank transfer (upon request)
- BIR-accredited receipts issued for all payments

---

## Policies

### Check-in & Check-out
- **Check-in**: 2:00 PM
- **Check-out**: 12:00 PM (noon)
- **Early check-in**: FREE when rooms are available and ready
- **Luggage storage**: Available before check-in and after check-out

### Pet Policy
- Pets are not allowed inside rooms or common indoor areas
- Service animals are permitted with prior notice — please inform us at the time of booking

### Children
- Children 5 years old and below stay FREE
- Children 13 and below must be supervised by parents/guardians at the pool

### Pool Rules
- Pool entrance fee for day visitors: Adults ₱50, Children 3-5 ₱20, Under 3 FREE
- Guests staying at the resort have FREE pool access
- Pool hours: 8:00 AM - 8:00 PM daily

### House Rules
- Smoking: Allowed only in outdoor areas, prohibited inside rooms
- Quiet hours: 8:00 PM - 9:00 AM
- Outside food/drinks: Allowed (corkage only charged for drinks sold in mini-store)
- Sound systems: Allowed but must not disturb other guests
- Outside visitors: Welcome, please inform staff beforehand

### Accessibility
- The property is NOT wheelchair accessible

---

## Frequently Asked Questions (Complete)

### Getting Here & Location

**Q: How far is Mariden Resort from Siargao Airport (IAO)?**
A: Only about 5 minutes by car. We're the closest resort to the airport.

**Q: How far are you from Cloud 9 / General Luna?**
A: About 15 km away, roughly a 20-25 minute drive.

**Q: Do you offer airport pickup or drop-off?**
A: Yes, transfers to or from the airport cost ₱200 each way. For other destinations, we can provide quotations.

**Q: How much for pickup from General Luna?**
A: ₱500 per trip from General Luna to the resort.

**Q: Is there parking available?**
A: Yes, free parking is available for all guests.

**Q: Are there places to eat nearby?**
A: Yes, there are several local eateries (carinderias) just a few minutes away serving authentic Filipino food.

---

### Rooms & Accommodations

**Q: What rooms do you have?**
A: We have three room types:
- Cozy Double Room: ₱1,500/night, good for 2 guests
- Twin A-Frame Room: ₱2,500/night, good for 2-4 guests
- Snug Family Room: ₱4,000/night, good for 6-8 guests

**Q: Do you have air-conditioning and hot shower?**
A: Yes, all rooms are fully air-conditioned with private bathrooms and hot showers.

**Q: Can I add extra guests?**
A: Yes. Cozy Double Room allows 1 extra bed (₱500). Snug Family Room allows up to 2 extra beds (₱500 each). Twin A-Frame Room has a sofa bed included.

**Q: Do you provide baby cots or extra beds?**
A: Extra beds are available for ₱500 each. Baby cots are not available at this time.

**Q: Can you accommodate large families or groups?**
A: Yes! Our Snug Family Room accommodates 6-8 guests, and we have event cottages for 10-60 guests.

---

### Pricing & Packages

**Q: How much is the swimming pool?**
A: For day visitors: Adults ₱50, Children 3-5 ₱20, Under 3 FREE. Resort guests have FREE pool access.

**Q: How much for the cottages?**
A: ₱500 (10-15 guests), ₱1,000 (20-30 guests), ₱1,500 (50-60 guests).

**Q: Do you have event packages?**
A: Yes:
- Package A (₱4,000): ₱1,000 cottage + FREE videoke + free entrance for all guests
- Package B (₱5,000): ₱1,500 cottage + FREE videoke + free entrance for all guests
- Package C (₱10,000): Exclusive resort rental + FREE videoke + free entrance

**Q: Do you offer discounts for long stays or groups?**
A: Yes, we provide discounts for extended stays and group bookings. Contact us for personalized rates.

**Q: Do children need to pay?**
A: Children 5 years old and below stay FREE. Extra beds are charged separately.

---

### Booking & Reservations

**Q: Can I book directly instead of through Agoda or Booking.com?**
A: Yes! Book directly at https://book.maridenresort.com/booking/result?code=019d8aea-246b-78ee-8502-31f2f1f946fe. We usually offer the best rates when booking direct.

**Q: How can I secure my reservation?**
A: Reservations without deposit are first-come, first-served. To guarantee your booking, we require a 30% down payment (non-refundable but deductible from total).

**Q: How quickly do you respond to inquiries?**
A: Within 1-2 hours during business hours (8:00 AM - 8:00 PM).

**Q: What is your cancellation policy?**
A: Cancellations 30+ days before arrival receive full refund. Cancellations within 30 days may be considered case-by-case.

**Q: What payment methods do you accept?**
A: PayPal, Wise, Xendit (Mastercard/Visa), cash, GCash and bank transfer upon request.

---

### Check-In & Check-Out

**Q: What are your check-in and check-out times?**
A: Check-in: 2:00 PM, Check-out: 12:00 PM (noon). Early check-in and late check-out are FREE when rooms are available.

**Q: Can we leave luggage before check-in or after check-out?**
A: Yes, you may safely leave your luggage with us.

**Q: Do you issue official receipts?**
A: Yes, we issue BIR-accredited receipts for all payments.

---

### Pool, Cottages & Events

**Q: Is the pool available year-round?**
A: Yes, except during scheduled monthly maintenance.

**Q: Are there rules for kids in the pool?**
A: Children 13 and below must always be supervised by parents or guardians.

**Q: Do you allow exclusive resort rental for events?**
A: Yes, we accept exclusive bookings. Note: Checked-in guests will still have access to designated areas.

**Q: Do checked-in guests have access to all facilities?**
A: Yes, checked-in guests have access to all resort facilities for reasonable use.

---

### Dining & Food

**Q: Is breakfast included in the room rate?**
A: No, but we serve home-style local meals that can be ordered separately.

**Q: Do you serve meals?**
A: Yes, we serve meals prepared with simple, home-style local cuisine.

**Q: Do you have a restaurant or bar on-site?**
A: We have a small in-house restaurant serving local favorites.

**Q: Is outside food and drinks allowed?**
A: Yes, you may bring your own food and drinks.

**Q: Can you accommodate special dietary needs?**
A: We do our best to accommodate requests — please inform us in advance.

---

### Amenities & Services

**Q: Is there WiFi?**
A: Yes! All rooms have dedicated WiFi access points powered by Starlink.

**Q: Is the WiFi strong enough for work or video calls?**
A: Yes, we use Starlink with dedicated access points per room for stable connections.

**Q: Do you provide towels, toiletries, or shampoo?**
A: Yes, fresh towels and refillable toiletries including shampoo and body wash.

**Q: Do you provide free drinking water?**
A: Yes, complimentary bottled water is provided for all guests.

**Q: Do guests have access to a kitchen?**
A: Yes, guests may use the kitchen (clean as you go policy).

**Q: Do you offer laundry services?**
A: Yes, ₱60/kg (minimum ₱300). Same-day or 24-hour turnaround. Available daily 10AM-7PM.

**Q: Do you welcome long-term stays?**
A: Yes! We offer special weekly/monthly rates including free water, electricity, Starlink internet, and kitchen access.

**Q: Do you offer motorbike or car rentals?**
A: Yes, with discounts for rentals longer than 3 days.

**Q: Do you arrange island hopping or tours?**
A: We can refer you to trusted local operators.

**Q: Is the property wheelchair accessible?**
A: Unfortunately, no.

---

### Families & Guests

**Q: Are pets allowed?**
A: Pets are not allowed inside rooms or common indoor areas. Service animals are permitted with prior notice — please inform us at the time of booking.

**Q: Do you allow outside visitors?**
A: Yes, visitors are welcome. Please inform staff beforehand.

---

### Policies & Rules

**Q: Is smoking allowed?**
A: Only in outdoor areas. Prohibited inside rooms.

**Q: Do you charge corkage for food or drinks?**
A: Only for drinks that are also available in our mini-store.

**Q: Do you have quiet hours?**
A: Yes, 8:00 PM - 9:00 AM.

**Q: Can we bring our own sound system?**
A: Yes, as long as it doesn't disturb other guests.

---

### Sustainability

**Q: Do you practice eco-friendly operations?**
A: Yes. We use solar power, refillable pump dispensers, and DIY soluble soaps to minimize waste.

---

## About Us

### Our Story
Mariden Resort started in 2022 during the pandemic. What was once simple farmland became a family project — not just for our retirement, but to create jobs for our local community in Del Carmen.

The name "Mariden" comes from the couple who built it: Marites and Riden. We poured our hearts into creating a place where visitors can truly disconnect from the noise and reconnect with what matters.

### Sustainable Practices
- **Solar Power**: Resort is partly powered by solar energy with backup generator
- **Reduced Plastic**: Refillable pump dispensers for shampoo and soap in all rooms
- **Native Plants**: Landscape features local plants that thrive naturally in Siargao's climate
- **DIY Soluble Soaps**: Concentrated solutions diluted on-site to minimize plastic waste

### For Digital Nomads
We welcome remote workers and offer long-term rates that include:
- Free water and electricity
- Complimentary Starlink internet
- Full kitchen privileges
- Contact us for personalized monthly rates

---

## Nearby Attractions

- **Sugba Lagoon**: Popular island hopping destination (accessible via boat from Del Carmen)
- **Maasin Coconut Plantation View Point**: Scenic overlook of coconut plantations
- **Maasin River**: Kayaking and nature exploration
- **Del Carmen Mangrove Boardwalk**: Educational walk through preserved mangrove forests
- **Cloud 9**: Famous surfing spot (20-25 min drive)
- **General Luna**: Main tourist area with restaurants and nightlife (20-25 min drive)

---

## Travel Guides (14 Total)

Detailed guides to help you explore Del Carmen and Siargao's best attractions.

### Del Carmen Area Guides (8 guides)

**Sugba Lagoon**
- **URL**: https://www.maridenresort.com/guides/sugba-lagoon
- **Overview**: Del Carmen's #1 attraction - a hidden lagoon with emerald waters accessible by boat
- **Distance**: 5-10 minutes from Mariden Resort to Del Carmen Tourism Center (boat jump-off)
- **Key Info**: Boat rentals approx. ₱1,600/boat (good for 6 people). Island hopping packages available.
- **Activities**: Swimming, paddleboarding, kayaking, cliff jumping, island hopping
- **Pro Tip**: No single-use plastic bottles allowed. Bring reusable tumblers.

**Mangrove Boardwalk**
- **URL**: https://www.maridenresort.com/guides/mangrove-boardwalk
- **Overview**: Explore the Philippines' largest contiguous mangrove forest on a peaceful boardwalk
- **Distance**: At the Del Carmen Tourism Center (same location as Sugba Lagoon jump-off)
- **Experience**: 1.5km elevated boardwalk through mangroves, bird watching, sunset views, educational signage
- **Entry Fee**: ₱20 per person
- **Best For**: Nature walks, photography, educational experience

**Maasin Coconut Plantation & River**
- **URL**: https://www.maridenresort.com/guides/maasin-coconut-plantation-and-river
- **Overview**: Guide to the famous "Red Bridge" and "Palm Tree Road" photo spots
- **Distance**: Approx. 15 minutes from Mariden Resort
- **Activities**: Photography at coconut road, river kayaking, Red Bridge viewpoint, local snacks
- **Best For**: Instagram-worthy photos and nature exploration

**Sohoton Cove**
- **URL**: https://www.maridenresort.com/guides/sohoton-cove
- **Overview**: Enchanted lagoon with caves, rock formations, and stingless jellyfish sanctuary
- **Distance**: Boat tour from Del Carmen (part of island hopping packages)
- **Activities**: Lagoon swimming, cave exploration, jellyfish sanctuary, kayaking through caves
- **Entry Fee**: Varies by tour package
- **Best For**: Adventure seekers, nature lovers, unique experiences

**Tri-Island Tour**
- **URL**: https://www.maridenresort.com/guides/tri-island-tour
- **Overview**: Classic Siargao island hopping - Guyam, Daku, and Naked Island
- **Distance**: Boat tour (typically departs from General Luna area)
- **Islands**: Guyam (tiny coconut island), Daku (beach with restaurant), Naked (sandbar)
- **Activities**: Swimming, snorkeling, beach hopping, photography
- **Best For**: Classic Siargao experience, beach lovers

**Alegria Beach**
- **URL**: https://www.maridenresort.com/guides/alegria-beach
- **Overview**: Santa Monica's white sand beach with calm waters perfect for families
- **Distance**: 43-47 minutes from Mariden Resort (32 km)
- **Activities**: Swimming, beach relaxation, local culture immersion, sunrise views
- **Entry Fee**: ₱20 per person + ₱20 parking
- **Facilities**: Beachfront resorts (DaRosa Del Mar, 3B Beach Resort, Isla Marajaw), cottages, eateries
- **Best For**: Safe swimming, family outings, peaceful beach days

**Taktak Falls**
- **URL**: https://www.maridenresort.com/guides/taktak-falls
- **Overview**: 15-meter (49-50 foot) jungle waterfall in Santa Monica's interior
- **Distance**: 40-60 minutes from Mariden Resort
- **Activities**: Swimming in natural pool, waterfall photography, jungle exploration
- **Entry Fee**: ₱50 per person + ₱20 parking
- **Safety Note**: Concrete pathways are extremely slippery - sturdy water shoes essential
- **Best Season**: Dry season (March-October) for safer conditions and clearer water

**Secret Beach (Malinao)**
- **URL**: https://www.maridenresort.com/guides/secret-beach-malinao
- **Overview**: Hidden beach in Malinao accessible via short hike or boat
- **Distance**: Varies depending on access point
- **Activities**: Swimming, beach exploration, photography
- **Best For**: Adventure seekers looking for off-the-beaten-path beaches

### North Siargao Guides (2 guides)

**Magpupungko Rock Pools**
- **URL**: https://www.maridenresort.com/guides/magpupungko-rock-pools
- **Overview**: Stunning tidal rock pools on Siargao's east coast - natural infinity pools
- **Distance**: 30-35 minutes from Mariden Resort
- **Location**: Barangay Consolacion, Pilar (East Coast)
- **Activities**: Swimming in tidal pools, cliff jumping (3-5 meters), photography
- **Entry Fee**: ₱50 per person
- **Critical**: Only accessible during low tide - check tide schedules daily
- **Best Time**: Dry season (March-October), weekday mornings for fewer crowds

**Pacifico Beach**
- **URL**: https://www.maridenresort.com/guides/pacifico-beach
- **Overview**: Premier surf beach with world-class Big Wish left-hand break
- **Distance**: 45-60 minutes from Mariden Resort
- **Location**: Barangao Pacifico, San Isidro (Northeast coast)
- **Activities**: Surfing (intermediate-advanced), swimming, beach walks, sunrise viewing
- **Entry Fee**: ₱20 per person
- **Surf Level**: NOT for beginners - powerful reef break
- **Facilities**: Beachfront resorts (Bamboo Surf Beach, Pacifico Beach Resort, LaFinca Hostel), cafes, surf shop
- **Best Season**: September-March for consistent surf swells

### Travel Planning Guides (4 guides)

**Siargao Airport Guide**
- **URL**: https://www.maridenresort.com/guides/airport-guide
- **Overview**: Essential information for arriving and departing passengers at Siargao Airport (IAO)
- **Transfers**: We offer airport transfers (₱200 per person). Van terminals available for General Luna (approx. ₱300).
- **Facilities**: Small terminal, no ATMs inside arrival area (bring cash), basic food stalls
- **Key Info**: Environmental fee required upon exit, baggage claim takes 15-20 minutes
- **Pro Tip**: Book airport transfers in advance during peak season

**Transportation Guide**
- **URL**: https://www.maridenresort.com/guides/transportation-guide
- **Overview**: Complete guide to getting around Siargao Island
- **Options**: Motorcycle rentals, tricycles, vans, habal-habal, bicycles
- **Key Info**: Motorcycle most popular (₱350-500/day), road conditions vary
- **Best For**: Planning your island exploration and understanding transport costs

**Best Time to Visit**
- **URL**: https://www.maridenresort.com/guides/best-time-to-visit
- **Overview**: Weather patterns, seasonal planning, and optimal visit timing
- **Dry Season**: March-October (best for beaches, clearest water)
- **Wet Season**: November-February (surf season, fewer crowds)
- **Best For**: Planning your trip based on activities and weather preferences

**Del Carmen vs. General Luna**
- **URL**: https://www.maridenresort.com/guides/del-carmen-vs-gl
- **Overview**: Comprehensive comparison to help you choose your Siargao base
- **Del Carmen**: Quiet, nature-focused, convenient for airport/Sugba Lagoon, 5 min from airport, 30-50% cheaper. Best for families, couples, peace-seekers, and exploring North Siargao.
- **General Luna**: Lively, party-focused, surf center, Cloud 9 access, nightlife. Best for surfers, solo travelers, and party scene.
- **Strategic Insight**: Del Carmen provides faster access to North Siargao attractions (Magpupungko, Pacifico, Taktak Falls, Alegria)

---
